text: No person shall place or maintain or display upon or in view of any highway any light in such position as to prevent the driver of a vehicle from readily recognizing any official traffic control device.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 2. Traffic Signs, Signals, and Markings [21350 - 21468]
#### Article 3. Offenses Relating to Traffic Devices [21450 - 21468]
##### § 21466

No person shall place or maintain or display upon or in view of any highway any light in such position as to prevent the driver of a vehicle from readily recognizing any official traffic control device.

*(Amended by Stats. 1970, Ch. 968.)*

subsections.text: No person shall place or maintain or display upon or in view of any highway any light in such position as to prevent the driver of a vehicle from readily recognizing any official traffic control device.
